think_blocks:
The user wants me to segment the video into specific time ranges and provide a transcript and summary for each.

**Segment 1: 00:00 - 00:43**
- **Visuals:** Two men are sitting on a couch. One is wearing a black jacket with a red logo (Caedrel), and the other is wearing a T1 jacket (Keria). They are talking and laughing. Caedrel gets up and walks away.
- **Audio:** They greet each other, discuss the live stream, and Caedrel mentions he was just on the desk. Keria talks about being nervous. Caedrel leaves to get a headset for someone else.
- **Transcript:** "Hello, hello, can you hear me? Yeah, is this live? Yeah, it's live. All the chat's here. They're saying hello. It's live, all the chats. Hello. This is Becker. He was just. He was just on the desk. How was the desk? Was it fun? I mean, I think, yeah, I was very nervous because usually I'm the one who like interprets or translates when JSON is not available. Nervous? I don't know. I don't know. I don't know. Yeah. always you know send players message yeah but then the game five I was very hyped and then the handle was asking You're doing, would you be down for the analyst? Yeah, analyst. And I was like, okay, with whom? And then, yourself. yourself. Is that your first time doing like a media thing? Like on a live interview? Yeah, I think so. Yeah, yeah, probably. On stage at least, yeah. Like on a broadcast? Hallå, hej, hallå hallå hallå You can come around this way and I'll give you the headset."

**Segment 2: 00:43 - 01:38**
- **Visuals:** Caedrel returns with a headset and hands it to Faker, who sits between Caedrel and Keria. They all put on headsets.
- **Audio:** Caedrel welcomes Faker and explains the chat. He asks Faker how he's feeling after back-to-back game fives. Faker responds in Korean, translated by Keria.
- **Transcript:** "Hello, hello, hello. Here you go. Welcome, welcome. This is the chat. Everyone's saying hello. They have like Twitch emotes. I don't know, I think he used Twitch before, but there's lots of like emotes in chat where they're all spamming like hi. 트위치 이모지로 이렇게 인사하고 계신다고 합니다. Rich emojis. Thank you. How are you doing? Must be like super tiring back-to-back game fives like how's your energy after the last couple days? all. No. 이겼구나 생각도 들고 내일 경기 어떻게 해야 될지 좀 그런 생각하고 있습니다. So I calmly think we won and I just got to be prepared for tomorrow's match. Thank you."

**Segment 3: 01:38 - 06:13**
- **Visuals:** The three men are sitting together. Caedrel is interviewing Faker, with Keria translating. They discuss game strategies, champion picks, and Faker's English skills.
- **Audio:** Caedrel asks about Aurora vs. Viktor, Kassadin, Faker's English, Vancouver, and the atmosphere between games. Faker answers in Korean, Keria translates. They also discuss champion win rates and Faker's favorite series.
- **Transcript:** "Yeah, I had just a couple questions of draft. Of course, I don't want you to leak anything, but I saw you went Aurora in game three instead of Victor, and you traded the other side of the matchup. Normally, you like to go Victor. Is there a reason why you went Aurora instead of Victor? I would like to try to improve the game but I don't think it's not good for the 3rd set. So I think team fight wise, Aura probably was a better pick at that time. Yeah. But in the early stage, in the middle stage of the game, in Game 3, I think it didn't really work out well. And were you thinking about Kassadin game five? Like the hover, were you thinking about it? 어 뭐 카사진도 좀 생각하고 있습니다 좀 그때는 좀 선택 I was thinking about it, but I think it was just a choice between. Your English is so good. It's crazy. Your English is so good. All the chat has like loads of random emotes. There's like emotes of you, of like Faker and stuff like that. Loads of hearts. Do you like Vancouver? Are you enjoying it? 어 밴쿠버 저는 이제 오면서 집을 봤는데 집들이 이제 좀 되게 예쁘게 돼 있는 거 보고 좀 좋았고 근데 사실 뭐 벤쿠버라기보다는 저희가 지금 아직 호텔에만 계속 있기 때문에 벤쿠버는 아직 도착을 못한 것 같습니다. Coming out of the airport, I've seen a lot of the beautiful buildings, beautiful houses, so I definitely have a good impression. Yeah. But it's more like me staying in the hotel rather than in Vancouver. So I think we're still on our way to Vancouver. That's true. Thank you. What was game 5 like? Focus. You're down 2-1, you win game 4. Is it just all draft talk? Like draft, draft, draft? In the between of the game 4 and game 5? Yeah. Yeah. 4경기, 5경기 사이에 그냥 픽 밴 얘기만 했는지 아니면 어떤 얘기만 했는지 一般的概念解 We'll just talk about the story of the MPK. 아무래도 피어리스에서는 좀 시간이 부족하니까 댐픽 얘기만 많이 하는 것 같아요. So going through the competition, I think the statistics actually has a very small sample size. So, and I think it's more a matter of what kind of competition we have, etc. So I think it's hard to tell from just, you know. Um, numbers. given in this short international tournament. I saw it at the start of the day. Before the first game, you were on stage really long, everyone else had left. So it was going to be a BO5 series, so I want to make sure that my setting is on point. Mm-hmm. Yeah. So I, you know, spent a lot of time setting up. Like what's the one where you look back and you think, damn, that was cool. 어, 뭐... 사실 기억나는 거 작년 웨즈 5세트? 아 향렴 월드 시리즈 Oh, I remember the game series. 뭐 다 이제 굉장히 재미있는 경기들이 워낙 많아서 다 좋지만 또 역시 팬분들이 좋아해 주시는 게 가장 기억에 남는 거죠. So I was shocked back then, but during this MSI, he's been great, so I'll... Yeah, he's... Yeah, he's been really good. Yeah. Yeah, I'll just let him be. So I think every region has a, you know, cannot have a stable or consistent player pool. So even LPL and LCK, they're, you know, down errors and et cetera. So I think time will heal. will heal. Time will heal things. Yeah. Okay, got two more questions. **Segment 4: 06:13 - 08:34**
- **Visuals:** The interview continues. They discuss Poboy joining Fnatic. Faker gives his opinion. They wrap up the interview, take a photo, and remove headsets.
- **Audio:** Caedrel asks about Poboy joining Fnatic. Faker says he thinks Poboy will do well and mentions teaching him things in the past. They thank each other and take a photo.
- **Transcript:** "Hobie's coming to Fnatic in Europe. 포비가 포나틱에 간다는 썰이 있는데 어..오피셜에요? Rumor. If he was to join Fnatic as a rumor, it's probably... If he wasn't. **Segment 5: 08:34 - 08:47**
- **Visuals:** The three men give thumbs up to the camera and smile. Faker and Keria stand up and leave.
- **Audio:** They give thumbs up. Caedrel says "W Faker".
- **Transcript:** (No speech, just visual cues of thumbs up and leaving)

**Segment 6: 08:47 - 08:53**
- **Visuals:** Caedrel is alone on the couch, looking at the camera and smiling.
- **Audio:** Caedrel says "W Faker" and thanks Chad.
- **Transcript:** "WFaker, WFaker, big Ws. Yo, Chad, thank you for hanging out."

**Segment 7: 08:53 - 09:03**
- **Visuals:** Caedrel is alone, talking to the camera.
- **Audio:** Caedrel reflects on the interview, saying he didn't want to do anything crazy but got good answers.
- **Transcript:** "Hopefully the interview was good, I didn't want to do anything too crazy in the interview, but yeah, I think I had some... some good answers, which was nice."
